title: Generic 12 x Crazyy Candy Factory Gummy Dippers 60g (Full Box) - Fruit flavour gummy sweets with a sour candy gel
features: Fruit flavour gummy sweets with a sour candy gel
Each pack contains fruity gummy, sugar coated worms and a sour strawberry or blue raspberry gel
All you need to enjoy the taste sensation of these Gummy Dippers is dip the fruity worms into the blue raspberry or strawberry gel
description: Product description Crazyy Candy Factory Gummy Dippers 60g Fruit flavour gummy sweets with a sour candy gel Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Glucose-Fructose Syrup, Sugar, Dextrose, Modified Corn Starch, Acids (Citric Acid, Malic Acid), Maltodextrin, Flavourings, Beef Gelatine, Acidity Regulator (E331), Glazing Agent (E903), Vegetable Oil (Palm), Preservative (E202), Colours (E120, E133, E100).
